settings.title: PRODUCT CARE
settings.content:
Jewelry is a timeless investment, and so caring for your pieces will help ensure their luster and longevity.

Always store your pieces in a safe, dry place when not worn to protect them from the elements of daily exposure. Use a protective (lined) box, a tarnish-resistant pouch or a plastic zip lock bag made of polyethylene.

For cleaning, pour a small amount of mild soap into lukewarm water and use a small, very soft toothbrush to clean your jewelry.

See our Product Care page for more comprehensive care details on specific materials and finishing.

settings.title: Exchange & Return Policy
settings.content:
At Toylicious.pk, your satisfaction means everything to us. If you're not fully happy with your purchase, we offer a simple and clear exchange process. Our customer care team is here to support you every step of the way.

Eligibility for Exchange
- All toys purchased online from Toylicious.pk are eligible for exchange within 7 days of delivery.
- Clearance items, discounted products, or items marked as non-returnable are not eligible for exchange.
- A valid order confirmation email or invoice is required.

Conditions for Exchange
- Items must be unused and in original condition
- Must include all original tags, labels, and accessories
- Must be returned in the original packaging (especially for boxed or electronic toys)
- The original invoice must be provided
- For damaged, incorrect, or defective items, photo or video proof is required

How to Exchange
- Email: toyliciousofficial@gmail.com
- Call: +92 337 6246084
If your request meets our conditions, we’ll guide you through the process. Allow 7–10 business days for completion after verification.

Return Policy
Returns are accepted only if:
- The request is made within 7 days of receiving your order
- The item is unused, in its original packaging, and includes all tags
- You provide valid proof of purchase
- The item received is damaged, defective, or incorrect

Return Process
- Email: toyliciousofficial@gmail.com
- Call: +92 337 6246084
Customers must send the product to our return address at their own expense.
Once the item is received and verified, we will ship you a replacement product.

Questions? We're always happy to assist—reach out anytime!

settings.code: Need product help? Chat with our representative now on Whatsapp.

settings.title: ETHICALLY SOURCED, FAIRLY PRICED
settings.text:
To make luxury accessible, Lumière is on the constant hunt for the most exciting independent brands and world-class, emerging designers hailing from diverse cultural backgrounds across the globe. To sell directly to you.

* Without the 8-10X insane markups of traditional retailers.
* Without any unnecessary middleman fees.
* Without any dubious workplace practices.
* 100% responsibly and sustainably sourced.

Fine jewelry deserves fair prices.
Because we love gold, but not price tags.

settings.heading: SOMETHING DELIGHTFUL IS IN THIS BOX!
settings.textarea:
Everyday you receive Lumière's iconic box is a very special day.
Why else are we here if not to praise and celebrate our passion for life!
Celebrate YOU and those whom you LOVE!
